modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't open Respondus LockDown Browser on my Lenovo laptop.

full_description_text:  
I tried to open the LockDown Browser.  
But it says I need to close ArcSoft WebCam Companion first.  
I don’t know why it won’t just open.  
This is really annoying!
